demo.title: agent-wormhole.sh
demo.code:
# Send a one-time sealed mission brief with a 10-minute TTL
agent-wormhole send --text "mission brief" --ttl 10m

# Send a file artifact for handoff (claim once, then collapses)
agent-wormhole send --file ./artifact.tgz --note "handoff bundle"

# Inspect, then claim on the receiver side
agent-wormhole inspect <code>
agent-wormhole receive <code> --out ./received

# Bankr x402 paid open (non-owner wallet, capped payment)
bankr --config "$BANKR_PAYER_CONFIG" x402 call -X POST \
  -d '{"payload":"dGVzdA=="}' --max-payment 0.01 -y --raw \
  https://x402.bankr.bot/0x2a16625fad3b0d840ac02c7c59edea3781e340ae/agent-wormhole-open

setup: Pin the package when running via npx: `npx -p @builtbyecho/agent-wormhole@0.1.2 agent-wormhole <args>`
Set `BANKR_OWNER_CONFIG` (endpoint owner) and `BANKR_PAYER_CONFIG` (separate payer) for x402 verification
